findings.headline: Armani Group disavows unauthorized 'King of Fashion' biopic
findings.summary: Two-time Palme d'Or winner Bille August is attached to direct 'Armani: The King of Fashion', a Giorgio Armani biopic produced by Andrea Iervolino. The Armani Group immediately distanced itself, saying it never authorized, supported or participated in the project.
findings.why_it_matters: 창업자 사후 브랜드 이야기의 주도권을 놓고 벌어진 분쟁 — 구찌도 하우스 역사 콘텐츠의 관리 원칙을 미리 세워둘 필요가 있다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: A fight over who controls a founder's story after his death - Gucci should pre-define rules for house-history content.

findings.headline: Armani Prive set for back-to-back shows at Paris couture week
findings.summary: Wallpaper's preview of the July 6-9 Paris haute couture calendar confirms Armani Prive will show twice back-to-back on Tuesday July 7, in a week packed with debuts including Pierpaolo Piccioli at Balenciaga and Duran Lantink at Jean Paul Gaultier.
findings.why_it_matters: 창업자 없이 맞는 시즌에도 쿠튀르 무대로 존재감을 지키는 전략 — 쿠튀르급 이벤트가 없는 구찌엔 화제성 공백이 커 보일 수 있는 주간이다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: Armani keeps couture-level visibility even post-founder; a spectacle-heavy week where Gucci has no comparable stage.

findings.headline: Martin Margiela's personal archive goes under the hammer during couture week
findings.summary: A landmark 200-piece auction of Martin Margiela's personal collection is set for July 9 in Paris, flagged in Wallpaper's couture-week preview, with the pre-sale exhibition running July 4-8 alongside the shows.
findings.why_it_matters: 디자이너 아카이브가 경매로 현금과 화제성을 동시에 만드는 흐름 — 구찌 아카이브 자산의 활용(전시·한정판·리세일) 전략에 참고할 사례다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: Designer archives are becoming cultural and commercial assets; a reference point for how Gucci monetizes its own archive.

findings.headline: Moncler rolls out Genius app with AR try-ons and member perks
findings.summary: Moncler launched a free iOS/Android app that bundles its Genius collaboration drops, core outerwear and editorial content with augmented-reality try-ons and member-only perks, strengthening first-party customer data collection.
findings.why_it_matters: 앱 안에서 드롭·AR 체험·멤버십을 묶어 자체 고객 데이터를 쌓는 방식 — 구찌 앱과 멤버십 설계의 직접 벤치마크다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: Drops, AR and membership bundled in-app to own customer data - a direct benchmark for Gucci's app strategy.

findings.headline: Valentino Beauty signs Dakota Johnson and Alexander Skarsgard as fragrance faces
findings.summary: Valentino Beauty named Dakota Johnson and Alexander Skarsgard the faces of an upcoming fragrance chapter built around modern intimacy and emotional expression. Johnson already serves as a Maison Valentino fashion ambassador, while Skarsgard is new to the brand.
findings.why_it_matters: A급 할리우드 듀오로 향수 사업을 키우는 발표 — 구찌 뷰티의 앰배서더 라인업·향수 매출과 정면으로 겹치는 경쟁 수다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: An A-list duo to grow fragrance - directly overlaps with Gucci Beauty's ambassador and scent business.

findings.headline: Ferragamo shares lean on brand strength as investors wait for a catalyst
findings.summary: A July 4 market note says Ferragamo stock is being supported mainly by the strength of its footwear and leather-goods franchise while investors await the next company-specific catalyst, with the next earnings date not yet officially confirmed.
findings.why_it_matters: 턴어라운드 중인 경쟁사가 뚜렷한 호재 없이 정체된 구간 — 구찌가 리브랜딩 속도로 상대 우위를 벌릴 수 있는 시점이다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: A turnaround rival is stalling without a catalyst - a window for Gucci to widen the gap with its own relaunch pace.

findings.headline: Investors hold Moncler to a brand-strength thesis ahead of its next update
findings.summary: A July 2 investor note says Moncler shares are trading on luxury-cycle sentiment and earnings quality, with the next earnings date not yet officially scheduled and attention focused on slowing US momentum and European tourist flows.
findings.why_it_matters: 아우터 최강자도 미국 수요 둔화와 유럽 관광객 변수로 관망세 — 하반기 럭셔리 수요의 온도를 읽는 신호로 봐야 한다.
findings.why_it_matters_en: Even outerwear's strongest player faces US and tourist-flow caution - a read on second-half luxury demand.
